rule: Queue recommends local next slices from verified GitHub source material without promoting review branches or mutating production inputs.

items.title: NMCLR proof body preserved candidate
items.proof_boundary: Preserved branch is not canonical full Nerdkle proof until execution proof and human promotion exist.
items.recommended_next_step: Completed. Keep this as sandbox proof unless Ben opens a human promotion gate.
forbidden: Do not call the branch canonical.
Do not move NMCLR into live root until human promotion exists.

items.title: Nerdkle nervous system organs preservation branch
items.proof_boundary: Fixture output is not production proof; production inputs and receipts are still required.
items.recommended_next_step: Build a read-only production-input locator for Swateyes, Fleyes, and Ender apoptosis before copying any organ into live paths.
proof_needed: real action payload from Medulla or Fastify
dry-run readback with file paths, byte counts, and SHA256 hashes
forbidden: Do not call no-input NO_FRICTION_DETECTED a healthy organism.
Do not mutate production DB rows.

items.title: Receipt crawler production movement proof branch
items.proof_boundary: Self-test output is not production movement proof until the real circulation.db ledger is read and updated.
items.recommended_next_step: Build a read-only ledger audit that reports LiveReceipt schema and candidate rows before any crawler movement proof.
forbidden: Do not update ASSIMILATED in this prep step.
Do not delete SQLite history rows.
Do not call DB_MISSING a successful receipt move.

items.title: Book architecture stream split and proof boundaries
items.recommended_next_step: Use the stream-split manuscript as a boundary reference in future receipts and reports, not as implementation proof.
proof_needed: quoted boundary language only when relevant
forbidden: Do not use manuscript doctrine as automation proof.
Do not mark Feral, NMCLR, TinkerDen, Dink, or Maker artifacts as working because this manuscript exists.
